mapper.insert: INSERT INTO attendance (user_id, work_date, clock_in, clock_out, modified_by, modified_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{workDate}, #{clockIn}, #{clockOut}, #{modifiedBy}, #{modifiedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE attendance SET user_id = #{userId}, work_date = #{workDate}, clock_in = #{clockIn}, clock_out = #{clockOut}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = #{modifiedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
